overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character ascending through dark industrial stairwells and service corridors before transitioning through back alleys and emerging into a vibrant neon-lit commercial district. The clip captures the atmospheric shift from enclosed industrial spaces with metal walkways to the open, bustling streets of Night City with digital billboards and moderate traffic.

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a dark industrial stairwell with metal grating floors and pipe railings. The character ascends through tight corridors with concrete walls and exposed cabling, passing two NPCs near a metal door where one is banging to gain entry. Warm artificial lighting contrasts with the surrounding darkness as the character continues upward through the enclosed industrial space.

scene_state.functional_zone: back service alley with dumpsters and graffiti

events.description: exiting industrial interior into outdoor service alley
passing green dumpsters and graffiti-covered walls

agents.ego_description: moving through dark back alley with scattered trash and industrial bins

entered.detail: large green industrial waste container against the wall
concrete wall covered in spray paint and street art
rusted metal trash bin with debris scattered around
large ventilation pipes running along the alley wall

segments.scene_description: The character exits the industrial building into a narrow service alley. The environment shifts to concrete ground with large green and metal dumpsters lining the walls. Graffiti covers the surfaces, and trash is scattered across the floor. The alley is dimly lit with no visible pedestrians, creating a secluded atmosphere as the character moves toward the distant city lights.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow passage with scaffolding approaching commercial street

events.description: neon lights from the main street become visible ahead
passing under metal scaffolding structure as the alley opens up

agents.ego_description: moving through narrow passage toward the lit commercial district

entered.detail: tall metal scaffolding structure blocking part of the alley exit
metal walkway bridge connecting buildings above the alley
bright colored light emanating from the commercial street ahead
electrical equipment and fuse boxes on the alley wall

segments.scene_description: The alley narrows further with metal scaffolding and overhead industrial bridges creating a semi-enclosed corridor. The lighting shifts from dark to mixed as bright neon glow from the commercial street ahead becomes visible. The character approaches the exit of the alley system, with the environment transitioning from industrial back-alleys to the vibrant city beyond.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit commercial downtown street with digital billboards

events.description: emerging from narrow alley onto the main commercial street with bright neon signage
vehicles passing by on the street including a blue truck and cars

agents.ego_description: walking along the commercial sidewalk surrounded by neon signs and other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: person in green coat walking ahead on the sidewalk
blue truck driving down the street past the character

entered.detail: massive illuminated advertising screen displaying PURE OVERKILL and other brands
bright neon signage for various commercial establishments
elevated pedestrian bridge connecting buildings across the street
tall street lights with bright white illumination
multi-story buildings with glass windows and storefronts

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the alley into the bustling main street of Night City. The scene opens into a wide commercial boulevard dominated by massive digital billboards and vibrant neon signage in blue and orange hues. Pedestrians walk along the sidewalk while vehicles pass by on the wet asphalt. Overhead walkways and futuristic architecture create a dense urban canyon atmosphere, marking a dramatic shift from the dark alleys to the lively city center.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the claustrophobic depths of a dark industrial interior into the vibrant, neon-lit expanse of a commercial city center. It begins in a dim stairwell of metal grating and exposed cabling, ascending through tight concrete corridors past NPCs gathered by a metal door. As the character exits the building, the environment shifts into a secluded service alley lined with graffiti-covered walls, green dumpsters, and scattered trash. The scene then narrows through a corridor of metal scaffolding and overhead bridges, where the darkness gradually gives way to a distant, colorful glow. Finally, the camera emerges from the alley into a wide urban boulevard, opening up to a dense canyon of futuristic architecture, massive digital billboards, and bustling traffic on wet asphalt.
